name: PM-KISAN Samman Nidhi
description: Income support of ₹6,000 per year to all landholding farmer families, payable in three equal installments directly into bank accounts.
benefits: ₹6,000 per year in 3 installments of ₹2,000 each via Direct Benefit Transfer.

name: Kisan Credit Card (KCC)
description: Provides farmers with timely credit support for cultivation at a low interest rate with crop insurance coverage.
benefits: Credit up to ₹3 lakh at 4% effective interest with interest subvention and crop insurance.

name: PM Fasal Bima Yojana (PMFBY)
description: Comprehensive crop insurance scheme that provides financial support to farmers suffering crop loss due to unforeseen events.
benefits: Full crop loss insurance at minimal premium (2% for Kharif, 1.5% for Rabi, 5% for horticultural crops).

name: PM MUDRA Yojana (PMMY)
description: Provides micro-finance loans to non-corporate, non-farm small/micro enterprises for income generation activities.
benefits: Collateral-free loans up to ₹10 lakh: Shishu (₹50K), Kishor (₹5L), Tarun (₹10L).

name: PM SVANidhi (Street Vendor Scheme)
description: Micro-credit facility for street vendors to resume livelihoods affected by the COVID-19 pandemic.
benefits: Initial working capital loan of ₹10,000 expandable up to ₹50,000 with regular repayment.

name: Startup India Seed Fund Scheme
description: Provides financial assistance to startups for proof of concept, prototype development, product trials, and market entry.
benefits: Seed funding up to ₹5 crore through DPIIT-recognized incubators.

name: National Scholarship Portal (NSP) - Central Schemes
description: Consolidated scholarship platform for students pursuing higher education under central government scholarship schemes.
benefits: Scholarship ranging from ₹5,000 to ₹50,000 per year based on course and category.

name: Post-Matric Scholarship for SC/ST Students
description: Financial assistance to SC/ST students pursuing post-matriculation studies to enable them to complete education.
benefits: Course fees + maintenance allowance (₹1,200 to ₹1,600/month for hostellers).

name: Pradhan Mantri Vaya Vandana Yojana
description: Pension scheme exclusively for senior citizens aged 60+ offering assured pension for 10 years against a lump sum purchase price.
benefits: Assured pension of up to ₹10,000/month for 10 years at 7.4% per annum return.

name: National Social Assistance Programme (NSAP) - Old Age
description: Social assistance to senior citizens who are below the poverty line and have little or no regular means of subsistence.
benefits: ₹300 to ₹500 per month pension for BPL senior citizens (age-based slabs).

name: PM-JAY Ayushman Bharat
description: World's largest government-funded health insurance program providing cashless secondary and tertiary care hospitalization.
benefits: Health cover of ₹5 lakh per family per year for secondary and tertiary hospitalization at empaneled hospitals.

name: PM Awas Yojana - Urban (PMAY-U)
description: Housing for all scheme providing interest subsidy on home loans for EWS/LIG/MIG categories.
benefits: Interest subsidy of 3-6.5% on home loans for 20 years; direct beneficiary transfer of ₹1.5 lakh for EWS.

name: PM Ujjwala Yojana (PMUY)
description: Free LPG gas connections to women from Below Poverty Line households to replace polluting cooking fuels.
benefits: Free LPG connection + first refill free + financial assistance up to ₹1,600 for stove and deposit.

name: PM Employment Generation Programme (PMEGP)
description: Credit-linked subsidy scheme for generation of employment opportunities through micro enterprises in non-farm sector.
benefits: Subsidy of 15-35% of project cost (max ₹25 lakh manufacturing, ₹10 lakh service). Bank loan for balance.

name: PM Suraksha Bima Yojana (PMSBY)
description: Accidental death and disability insurance scheme available to bank account holders at a nominal premium.
benefits: ₹2 lakh for accidental death/full disability, ₹1 lakh for partial disability — at just ₹20/year premium.

name: PM Jeevan Jyoti Bima Yojana (PMJJBY)
description: Life insurance scheme offering coverage for death due to any reason at a renewable annual premium.
benefits: ₹2 lakh life insurance coverage for just ₹436/year (auto-debited from bank account).

name: Post-Matric Scholarship for OBC Students
description: Financial assistance for OBC students pursuing post-matric education to promote higher education among backward classes.
benefits: Maintenance allowance of ₹1,000–₹1,200/month + course fee reimbursement.

name: Weavers Mudra Scheme
description: Credit support and interest subvention scheme for handloom weavers and artisans.
benefits: Credit up to ₹2 lakh at 6% interest per annum via MoT. Interest subvention of 7%.
